name: What’s the easiest page to fix first for ChatGPT visibility?
description: Start with your top service page and put the direct answer at the top.

mainEntity.name: What’s the easiest page to fix first for ChatGPT visibility?

acceptedAnswer.text: A good quick win is to rewrite your top service page with a direct 40 to 60 word answer at the top, then add question headings and a short FAQ. That single page can tell you a lot about whether your content is ready for ChatGPT-style answers.
acceptedAnswer.description: Start with your top service page and put the direct answer at the top.
